chapter_title.en: Chapter 106 – The severity of the afflictions of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول وقد يعد ضعيف ا - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/327)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول وقد يعد ضعيف ا - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/327)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

text: وَ عِنْدَهُ سَدِيرٌ إِنَّ اللَّهَ إِذَا أَحَبَّ عَبْداً غَتَّهُ بِالْبَلَاءِ غَتّاً وَ إِنَّا وَ إِيَّاكُمْ يَا سَدِيرُ لَنُصْبِحُ بِهِ وَ نُمْسِي .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Ahmad Bin Ubeyd, from Al Husayn  Bin Alwan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said, and in his<sup>asws</sup> presence was Sadeyr: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, when He<sup>azwj</sup> Loves a servant Immerses him in the afflictions with an immersion, and I<sup>asws</sup> and you all, O Sadeyr, are with it, in the morning and evening’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Ahmad ibn ‘Ubayd from al-Husayn ibn ‘Ulwan from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Sadir was present when the Imam said, ‘When Allah loves a servant He deeply immerses him in misfortunes. You and we, O Sadir, live in it mornings and evenings.’”
